title: heptapleurum oxyphyllum var. oxyphyllum
intro: Heptapleurum oxyphyllum var. oxyphyllum, also known as the climbing aralia or var. oxyphyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestion. Heptapleurum oxyphyllum var. oxyphyllum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various health conditions.
